left.text: Vectis is a security-first SaaS platform for teams that need to discover, govern, and operationalize data with confidence, from curated dictionaries to governed workspaces.
Built for regulated and mission-critical environments, Vectis combines role-aware access control, governed metadata, and modern cloud workspaces into one cohesive experience.

quoteArea.quote: Vectis delivers enterprise-grade trust: security by design, world-class user experience, and governed analytics at SaaS speed.
